title: Stitches
why_this_song: Stitches by Shawn Mendes (2015) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "But I know that I'll make it out alive"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I'll be needing stitches"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I'll be needing stitches"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "And now that I'm without your kisses"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "And now that I'm without your kisses"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i'll" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i'll" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "needing" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "needing" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I thought that I've been hurt before
Your bitter heart, cold to the touch
Needle and the thread, gonna wind up dead

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Stitches", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Stitches", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Stitches" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Stitches" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Stitches" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Stitches", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
